heading: Dissemination of research results
label: 285e–6 Dissemination of research results
text: The Director of the Institute shall disseminate the results of research conducted under and this section to appropriate professional entities and to the public.section 285e–5 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 11242 of this titlePub. L. 100–607

Amendments1988—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(a)section 11242 of this title, substituted “the Institute” for “the National Institute on Aging” and “ and this section” for “this part”.Pub. L. 100–607, § 142(d)(3)section 285e–5 of this title
